texto: You are so sweet. This is unbelievable. Some schmo talks to you every two weeks, buys you a meal, during which he talks about himself, dry-humps you, touches your hand once and you think he smells like roses. Maybe he is a white knight on a steed, who will carry you off into the future, so you can live happily ever after and, finally, maybe get it on.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a H. Raven Rose: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “You are so sweet. This is unbelievable. Some schmo talks to you every two weeks, buys you a meal,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, caffeine, eden pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Oh, my god, he thought, realizing why he had always felt negatively towards Eden. She reminds me of my mother. The thought made his throat close up tight. He mused about the day's events. What a ride. Edward had surprised him. The man had courage, committing to love. What had he said to that starlet, none of it meant anything?
